sentences.text_en: Oh my God.

sentences.text_en: That is so clear.
sentences.text_zh: 这太清楚了。

sentences.text_en: Mitchell.
sentences.text_zh: 米切尔。

sentences.text_en: See?
sentences.text_zh: 看到了吗？

sentences.text_en: She does that with everyone.
sentences.text_zh: 她对谁都这样。

sentences.text_en: It's just her face.
sentences.text_zh: 这只是她的表情而已。

sentences.text_en: No, it's not just the face.
sentences.text_zh: 不，不只是表情。

sentences.text_en: From the beginning, I feel like Manny and I are not welcome in this family.
sentences.text_zh: 从一开始，我就觉得曼尼和我不受这个家庭的欢迎。

sentences.text_en: That is so crazy.
sentences.text_zh: 这也太离谱了吧。

sentences.text_en: No, it's not so crazy.
sentences.text_zh: 不，没那么离谱。

sentences.text_en: It's how I feel.
sentences.text_zh: 这就是我的感觉。

sentences.text_en: I am sorry, if you feel that way.
sentences.text_zh: 如果你有这种感觉，我很抱歉。

sentences.text_en: I really am.
sentences.text_zh: 我真的很抱歉。

sentences.text_en: Because from the moment I met you, I have tried to make you feel comfortable with us.
sentences.text_zh: 因为自从我认识你开始，我就一直努力让你在我们家感到自在。

sentences.text_en: You think it's only in my head?
sentences.text_zh: 你觉得这只是我自己的想法吗？

sentences.text_en: No, kind, I don't know.
sentences.text_zh: 不，亲爱的，我不知道。

sentences.text_en: I mean, we really love having you and Manny and our family.
sentences.text_zh: 我的意思是，我们真的很高兴有你和曼尼加入我们的家庭。

sentences.text_en: Really?
sentences.text_zh: 真的吗？

sentences.text_en: So, you don't have to be so defensive.
sentences.text_zh: 所以，你不用这么防备啦。

sentences.text_en: I do that, don't I?
sentences.text_zh: 我确实会这样，不是吗？

sentences.text_en: I'm feeling a hug.
sentences.text_zh: 我好想来个拥抱啊。

sentences.text_en: I was thinking group hug, but this is nice.
sentences.text_zh: 我本来想着大家围成一圈抱一抱呢，不过这样也不错。

sentences.text_en: I'd be there if I could, oh my god, there's hugging.
sentences.text_zh: 要是能的话，我真想去抱一下，天哪，居然还有人抱呢。

sentences.text_en: Haley, get off the phone already.
sentences.text_zh: 海莉，快把电话放下吧。

sentences.text_en: Where did you go?
sentences.text_zh: 你去哪儿了？

sentences.text_en: You heard him?
sentences.text_zh: 你听见他说了吗？

sentences.text_en: You said get out of here.
sentences.text_zh: 你说要离开这里。

sentences.text_en: Oh my god, you're such a girl.
sentences.text_zh: 天哪，你真是个女孩子啊。

sentences.text_en: Dad, look, I was coming to get a beer anyways.
sentences.text_zh: 爸爸，你看，我本来就是来拿啤酒的。

sentences.text_en: Nice apology.
sentences.text_zh: 不错的道歉。

sentences.text_en: Nice beer.
sentences.text_zh: 不错的啤酒。

sentences.text_en: Hey, there's our little roust about.
sentences.text_zh: 嘿，这就是我们那点小打小闹啊。

sentences.text_en: You look like you patched things up pretty good, huh?
sentences.text_zh: 看起来你们把事情挺好的解决了，是吧？

sentences.text_en: Yeah.
sentences.text_zh: 是啊。

sentences.text_en: We can learn so much from the children.
sentences.text_zh: 我们能从孩子们身上学到好多东西。

sentences.text_en: , but it seems kind of silly now,
sentences.text_zh: ,不过现在看来有点傻乎乎的了,

sentences.text_en: which we've been fighting for lunch for lunch every day,
sentences.text_zh: 我们每天为了午饭都吵个不停,

sentences.text_en: I made fun of him because his mom used to dig coal.
sentences.text_zh: 我以前还取笑他呢，因为他妈妈以前挖过煤。

sentences.text_en: What?
sentences.text_zh: 什么？

sentences.text_en: He said you were a cold digger.
sentences.text_zh: 他说你是‘冷冰冰的挖煤人’。

sentences.text_en: Okay, I think we can move on.
sentences.text_zh: 好吧，我觉得我们可以继续了。

sentences.text_en: Who said I was a cold digger?
sentences.text_zh: 谁说我是个‘冷冰冰的挖煤人’？

sentences.text_en: That's what my mom told me.
sentences.text_zh: 是我妈这么跟我说的。

sentences.text_en: What's a cold digger?
sentences.text_zh: 什么叫‘冷冰冰的挖煤人’？

sentences.text_en: What's a cold digger?
sentences.text_zh: 什么叫‘冷冰冰的挖煤人’？

sentences.text_en: Sweetheart, you heard it wrong.
sentences.text_zh: 亲爱的，你听错啦。

sentences.text_en: It's gold digger.
sentences.text_zh: 是‘淘金者’。

sentences.text_en: I'm going to have to call you back.
sentences.text_zh: 我得再给你回个电话。

sentences.text_en: Well, I really do not think that I remember ever saying that.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，我真的不觉得我记得自己说过那句话。

sentences.text_en: Well, you sent in the car.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，是你把车送来的。

sentences.text_en: You said at Christmas.
sentences.text_zh: 你在圣诞节时说过。

sentences.text_en: You sent Mexican rock out.
sentences.text_zh: 你把墨西哥摇滚送出去了。

sentences.text_en: Hey, Mr. leaves the sweatshirts at school every day
sentences.text_zh: 嘿，先生每天都把卫衣落在学校里

sentences.text_en: and suddenly remembers everything.
sentences.text_zh: 然后突然就什么都记起来了。

sentences.text_en: Thank you.
sentences.text_zh: 谢谢。

sentences.text_en: And it was all in my head, huh?
sentences.text_zh: 原来这一切都只是我的幻觉，是吧？

sentences.text_en: Oh, listen, Gloria, it was like a year ago before I knew you...
sentences.text_zh: 哦，听着，格洛丽亚，大概是一年前我才认识你……

sentences.text_en: Nice going. Not my mom and my sister are fighting.
sentences.text_zh: 干得不错。不是我妈妈和我妹妹在吵架。

sentences.text_en: If I say something that everybody else is thinking,
sentences.text_zh: 如果我说了一些大家都这么想的话，

sentences.text_en: does that make me a mean person?
sentences.text_zh: 那算不算我是个刻薄的人呢？

sentences.text_en: Or does it make me a brave person, one who was courageous enough to stand up and say something
sentences.text_zh: 还是说我是个勇敢的人，一个敢于站出来、说出心里话的人，

sentences.text_en: behind someone's back to 10-year-old?
sentences.text_zh: 甚至敢在别人背后对一个十岁的小孩这么说？

sentences.text_en: Well, she's pissed.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，她生气了。

sentences.text_en: Yeah, she wouldn't even come out of her room.
sentences.text_zh: 是啊，她连房间都不肯出来了。

sentences.text_en: Did you really have to call her that?
sentences.text_zh: 你真的非得那样叫她吗？

sentences.text_en: A gold digger.
sentences.text_zh: ‘拜金女’。

sentences.text_en: Well, you know what, dad?
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，你知道吗，爸爸？

sentences.text_en: It was a year ago.
sentences.text_zh: 那是一年前的事了。

sentences.text_en: And it was a natural question to ask.
sentences.text_zh: 而且那本来就是个很自然的问题。

sentences.text_en: She's a beautiful, hot woman,
sentences.text_zh: 她是个又美又火辣的女人，

sentences.text_en: and you're not exactly, you know.
sentences.text_zh: 而你嘛，说实话，并不算……

sentences.text_en: Not exactly what?
sentences.text_zh: 不算什么？

sentences.text_en: Um, Mitchell, little help.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，米切尔，帮个忙呗。

sentences.text_en: No, you are doing great.
sentences.text_zh: 不，你做得很好。

sentences.text_en: Now see, this is exactly why we sweep things under the rug,
sentences.text_zh: 你看，这正是我们总爱把事情压下去的原因，

sentences.text_en: so people don't get hurt.
sentences.text_zh: 免得伤了别人。

sentences.text_en: Well, yeah, until you sweep too much under the rug.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，是啊，可要是压得太狠，

sentences.text_en: Then you got a lumpy rug.
sentences.text_zh: 那地毯就变得疙疙瘩瘩的了。

sentences.text_en: Creates a tripping hazard.
sentences.text_zh: 不但容易绊倒人，

sentences.text_en: Open yourself up to lawsuits.
sentences.text_zh: 还可能惹上官司呢。

sentences.text_en: Boy, you can go a really long time without blinking.
sentences.text_zh: 哎呀，你真能好久都不眨眼睛啊。

sentences.text_en: Gloria, it's Phil.
sentences.text_zh: 格洛丽亚，我是菲尔。

sentences.text_en: Hi, can I talk to you for a second?
sentences.text_zh: 嗨，能和你聊一会儿吗？

sentences.text_en: Claire likes to say you can be part of the problem or part of the solution.
sentences.text_zh: 克莱尔常说，你可以是问题的一部分，也可以是解决方案的一部分。

sentences.text_en: Well, I happen to believe that you can be both.
sentences.text_zh: 而我呢，恰恰相信你既能是问题的一部分，也能是解决方案的一部分。

sentences.text_en: Listen, Claire feels terrible.
sentences.text_zh: 听着，克莱尔现在特别难受。

sentences.text_en: Why don't you talk to her?
sentences.text_zh: 要不你跟她聊聊吧？

sentences.text_en: Why, I know what she thinks.
sentences.text_zh: 干嘛呢，我知道她在想啥。

sentences.text_en: A cold, dear.
sentences.text_zh: 冷冰冰的，亲爱的。

sentences.text_en: You know, she's saying gold.
sentences.text_zh: 你知道吗，她说的是‘金子’。

sentences.text_en: Yes, Phil.
sentences.text_zh: 对，菲尔。

sentences.text_en: Well, I know she said that, but that was a long time ago.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，我知道她以前这么说过，不过那是很久以前的事了。

sentences.text_en: Before...
sentences.text_zh: 在……之前……

sentences.text_en: Do you buy me nice things?
sentences.text_zh: 你会给我买好东西吗？

sentences.text_en: Yes, of course, all beautiful things.
sentences.text_zh: 当然啦，全是漂亮的东西。

sentences.text_en: Look at this, yellow, red, blue, all the colors.
sentences.text_zh: 瞧瞧这个，黄的、红的、蓝的，各种颜色都有。

sentences.text_en: Do you think I can't live without this?
sentences.text_zh: 你觉得没有这些我就活不下去吗？

sentences.text_en: Take them away, Phil.
sentences.text_zh: 拿走它们吧，菲尔。

sentences.text_en: Gloria, we all know you'd be fine without underwear.
sentences.text_zh: 格洛丽亚，咱们都知道，就算没穿内衣你也照样过得挺好。

sentences.text_en: I mean, we know it's not about that.
sentences.text_zh: 我的意思是，大家心里都明白，关键不在这儿。

sentences.text_en: No, it's about me not being accepted by my new family.
sentences.text_zh: 不，关键是我还没被新家庭接纳。

sentences.text_en: That is not true.
sentences.text_zh: 这不对。

sentences.text_en: Gloria, look, you're a beautiful woman.
sentences.text_zh: 格洛丽亚，听我说，你可是个漂亮的女士。

sentences.text_en: In fact, you're probably one of those beautiful women who doesn't even know it.
sentences.text_zh: 其实啊，你很可能就是那种连自己都意识不到美丽的女人。

sentences.text_en: No, I know it.
sentences.text_zh: 不，我清楚得很。

sentences.text_en: So, it's natural for Claire to wonder about you and her dad.
sentences.text_zh: 所以，克莱尔会对你和她爸爸的事感到好奇，这再正常不过了。

sentences.text_en: This family is very protective of each other.
sentences.text_zh: 这个家庭彼此都很护着对方。

sentences.text_en: I remember the first time Claire brought me home.
sentences.text_zh: 我记得第一次克莱尔把我带回家的时候。

sentences.text_en: Do you think Jay thought I was good enough for his little girl?
sentences.text_zh: 你觉得杰会认为我配得上他的小女儿吗？

sentences.text_en: No way.
sentences.text_zh: 才不会呢。

sentences.text_en: But over time, he realized that I loved Claire as much as he did.
sentences.text_zh: 不过时间一长，他慢慢发现，我对克莱尔的爱跟他对她的爱一样深。

sentences.text_en: And by then, Mitch had brought Cam home, so I was golden.
sentences.text_zh: 到那时候，米奇也把卡姆带回家了，所以我算是彻底稳住了。

sentences.text_en: Claire just needs a little time.
sentences.text_zh: 克莱尔只是需要点时间而已。

sentences.text_en: Then trust me, she'll be the most loyal friend you've ever had.
sentences.text_zh: 到时候你放心吧，她会是你这辈子最忠诚的朋友。

sentences.text_zh: 格洛丽亚，我不明白你为什么觉得我不喜欢你。

sentences.text_en: Well, sometimes when you see me, you make that face.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，有时候你见到我的时候，就会做出那种表情。

sentences.text_en: What face?
sentences.text_zh: 什么表情？

sentences.text_en: Like this?
sentences.text_zh: 像这样吗？

sentences.text_en: I do not make a face like that.
sentences.text_zh: 我才不会做那种表情呢。

sentences.text_en: Oh my God.
sentences.text_zh: 我的天哪。

sentences.text_en: That is so clear.
sentences.text_zh: 这太清楚了。

sentences.text_en: Mitchell.
sentences.text_zh: 米切尔。

sentences.text_en: See?
sentences.text_zh: 看到了吗？

sentences.text_en: She does that with everyone.
sentences.text_zh: 她对谁都这样。

sentences.text_en: It's just her face.
sentences.text_zh: 这只是她的表情而已。

sentences.text_en: No, it's not just the face.
sentences.text_zh: 不，不只是表情。

sentences.text_en: From the beginning, I feel like Manny and I are not welcome in this family.
sentences.text_zh: 从一开始，我就觉得曼尼和我不受这个家庭的欢迎。

sentences.text_en: That is so crazy.
sentences.text_zh: 这也太离谱了吧。

sentences.text_en: No, it's not so crazy.
sentences.text_zh: 不，没那么离谱。

sentences.text_en: It's how I feel.
sentences.text_zh: 这就是我的感觉。

sentences.text_en: I am sorry, if you feel that way.
sentences.text_zh: 如果你有这种感觉，我很抱歉。

sentences.text_en: I really am.
sentences.text_zh: 我真的很抱歉。

sentences.text_en: Because from the moment I met you, I have tried to make you feel comfortable with us.
sentences.text_zh: 因为自从我认识你开始，我就一直努力让你在我们家感到自在。

sentences.text_en: You think it's only in my head?
sentences.text_zh: 你觉得这只是我自己的想法吗？

sentences.text_en: No, kind, I don't know.
sentences.text_zh: 不，亲爱的，我不知道。

sentences.text_en: I mean, we really love having you and Manny and our family.
sentences.text_zh: 我的意思是，我们真的很高兴有你和曼尼加入我们的家庭。

sentences.text_en: Really?
sentences.text_zh: 真的吗？

sentences.text_en: So, you don't have to be so defensive.
sentences.text_zh: 所以，你不用这么防备啦。

sentences.text_en: I do that, don't I?
sentences.text_zh: 我确实会这样，不是吗？

sentences.text_en: I'm feeling a hug.
sentences.text_zh: 我好想来个拥抱啊。

sentences.text_en: I was thinking group hug, but this is nice.
sentences.text_zh: 我本来想着大家围成一圈抱一抱呢，不过这样也不错。

sentences.text_en: I'd be there if I could, oh my god, there's hugging.
sentences.text_zh: 要是能的话，我真想去抱一下，天哪，居然还有人抱呢。

sentences.text_en: Haley, get off the phone already.
sentences.text_zh: 海莉，快把电话放下吧。

sentences.text_en: Where did you go?
sentences.text_zh: 你去哪儿了？

sentences.text_en: You heard him?
sentences.text_zh: 你听见他说了吗？

sentences.text_en: You said get out of here.
sentences.text_zh: 你说要离开这里。

sentences.text_en: Oh my god, you're such a girl.
sentences.text_zh: 天哪，你真是个女孩子啊。

sentences.text_en: Dad, look, I was coming to get a beer anyways.
sentences.text_zh: 爸爸，你看，我本来就是来拿啤酒的。

sentences.text_en: Nice apology.
sentences.text_zh: 不错的道歉。

sentences.text_en: Nice beer.
sentences.text_zh: 不错的啤酒。

sentences.text_en: Hey, there's our little roust about.
sentences.text_zh: 嘿，这就是我们那点小打小闹啊。

sentences.text_en: You look like you patched things up pretty good, huh?
sentences.text_zh: 看起来你们把事情挺好的解决了，是吧？

sentences.text_en: Yeah.
sentences.text_zh: 是啊。

sentences.text_en: We can learn so much from the children.
sentences.text_zh: 我们能从孩子们身上学到好多东西。

sentences.text_en: , but it seems kind of silly now,
sentences.text_zh: ,不过现在看来有点傻乎乎的了,

sentences.text_en: which we've been fighting for lunch for lunch every day,
sentences.text_zh: 我们每天为了午饭都吵个不停,

sentences.text_en: I made fun of him because his mom used to dig coal.
sentences.text_zh: 我以前还取笑他呢，因为他妈妈以前挖过煤。

sentences.text_en: What?
sentences.text_zh: 什么？

sentences.text_en: He said you were a cold digger.
sentences.text_zh: 他说你是‘冷冰冰的挖煤人’。

sentences.text_en: Okay, I think we can move on.
sentences.text_zh: 好吧，我觉得我们可以继续了。

sentences.text_en: Who said I was a cold digger?
sentences.text_zh: 谁说我是个‘冷冰冰的挖煤人’？

sentences.text_en: That's what my mom told me.
sentences.text_zh: 是我妈这么跟我说的。

sentences.text_en: What's a cold digger?
sentences.text_zh: 什么叫‘冷冰冰的挖煤人’？

sentences.text_en: What's a cold digger?
sentences.text_zh: 什么叫‘冷冰冰的挖煤人’？

sentences.text_en: Sweetheart, you heard it wrong.
sentences.text_zh: 亲爱的，你听错啦。

sentences.text_en: It's gold digger.
sentences.text_zh: 是‘淘金者’。

sentences.text_en: I'm going to have to call you back.
sentences.text_zh: 我得再给你回个电话。

sentences.text_en: Well, I really do not think that I remember ever saying that.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，我真的不觉得我记得自己说过那句话。

sentences.text_en: Well, you sent in the car.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，是你把车送来的。

sentences.text_en: You said at Christmas.
sentences.text_zh: 你在圣诞节时说过。

sentences.text_en: You sent Mexican rock out.
sentences.text_zh: 你把墨西哥摇滚送出去了。

sentences.text_en: Hey, Mr. leaves the sweatshirts at school every day
sentences.text_zh: 嘿，先生每天都把卫衣落在学校里

sentences.text_en: and suddenly remembers everything.
sentences.text_zh: 然后突然就什么都记起来了。

sentences.text_en: Thank you.
sentences.text_zh: 谢谢。

sentences.text_en: And it was all in my head, huh?
sentences.text_zh: 原来这一切都只是我的幻觉，是吧？

sentences.text_en: Oh, listen, Gloria, it was like a year ago before I knew you...
sentences.text_zh: 哦，听着，格洛丽亚，大概是一年前我才认识你……

sentences.text_en: Nice going. Not my mom and my sister are fighting.
sentences.text_zh: 干得不错。不是我妈妈和我妹妹在吵架。

sentences.text_en: If I say something that everybody else is thinking,
sentences.text_zh: 如果我说了一些大家都这么想的话，

sentences.text_en: does that make me a mean person?
sentences.text_zh: 那算不算我是个刻薄的人呢？

sentences.text_en: Or does it make me a brave person, one who was courageous enough to stand up and say something
sentences.text_zh: 还是说我是个勇敢的人，一个敢于站出来、说出心里话的人，

sentences.text_en: behind someone's back to 10-year-old?
sentences.text_zh: 甚至敢在别人背后对一个十岁的小孩这么说？

sentences.text_en: Well, she's pissed.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，她生气了。

sentences.text_en: Yeah, she wouldn't even come out of her room.
sentences.text_zh: 是啊，她连房间都不肯出来了。

sentences.text_en: Did you really have to call her that?
sentences.text_zh: 你真的非得那样叫她吗？

sentences.text_en: A gold digger.
sentences.text_zh: ‘拜金女’。

sentences.text_en: Well, you know what, dad?
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，你知道吗，爸爸？

sentences.text_en: It was a year ago.
sentences.text_zh: 那是一年前的事了。

sentences.text_en: And it was a natural question to ask.
sentences.text_zh: 而且那本来就是个很自然的问题。

sentences.text_en: She's a beautiful, hot woman,
sentences.text_zh: 她是个又美又火辣的女人，

sentences.text_en: and you're not exactly, you know.
sentences.text_zh: 而你嘛，说实话，并不算……

sentences.text_en: Not exactly what?
sentences.text_zh: 不算什么？

sentences.text_en: Um, Mitchell, little help.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，米切尔，帮个忙呗。

sentences.text_en: No, you are doing great.
sentences.text_zh: 不，你做得很好。

sentences.text_en: Now see, this is exactly why we sweep things under the rug,
sentences.text_zh: 你看，这正是我们总爱把事情压下去的原因，

sentences.text_en: so people don't get hurt.
sentences.text_zh: 免得伤了别人。

sentences.text_en: Well, yeah, until you sweep too much under the rug.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，是啊，可要是压得太狠，

sentences.text_en: Then you got a lumpy rug.
sentences.text_zh: 那地毯就变得疙疙瘩瘩的了。

sentences.text_en: Creates a tripping hazard.
sentences.text_zh: 不但容易绊倒人，

sentences.text_en: Open yourself up to lawsuits.
sentences.text_zh: 还可能惹上官司呢。

sentences.text_en: Boy, you can go a really long time without blinking.
sentences.text_zh: 哎呀，你真能好久都不眨眼睛啊。

sentences.text_en: Gloria, it's Phil.
sentences.text_zh: 格洛丽亚，我是菲尔。

sentences.text_en: Hi, can I talk to you for a second?
sentences.text_zh: 嗨，能和你聊一会儿吗？

sentences.text_en: Claire likes to say you can be part of the problem or part of the solution.
sentences.text_zh: 克莱尔常说，你可以是问题的一部分，也可以是解决方案的一部分。

sentences.text_en: Well, I happen to believe that you can be both.
sentences.text_zh: 而我呢，恰恰相信你既能是问题的一部分，也能是解决方案的一部分。

sentences.text_en: Listen, Claire feels terrible.
sentences.text_zh: 听着，克莱尔现在特别难受。

sentences.text_en: Why don't you talk to her?
sentences.text_zh: 要不你跟她聊聊吧？

sentences.text_en: Why, I know what she thinks.
sentences.text_zh: 干嘛呢，我知道她在想啥。

sentences.text_en: A cold, dear.
sentences.text_zh: 冷冰冰的，亲爱的。

sentences.text_en: You know, she's saying gold.
sentences.text_zh: 你知道吗，她说的是‘金子’。

sentences.text_en: Yes, Phil.
sentences.text_zh: 对，菲尔。

sentences.text_en: Well, I know she said that, but that was a long time ago.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，我知道她以前这么说过，不过那是很久以前的事了。

sentences.text_en: Before...
sentences.text_zh: 在……之前……

sentences.text_en: Do you buy me nice things?
sentences.text_zh: 你会给我买好东西吗？

sentences.text_en: Yes, of course, all beautiful things.
sentences.text_zh: 当然啦，全是漂亮的东西。

sentences.text_en: Look at this, yellow, red, blue, all the colors.
sentences.text_zh: 瞧瞧这个，黄的、红的、蓝的，各种颜色都有。

sentences.text_en: Do you think I can't live without this?
sentences.text_zh: 你觉得没有这些我就活不下去吗？

sentences.text_en: Take them away, Phil.
sentences.text_zh: 拿走它们吧，菲尔。

sentences.text_en: Gloria, we all know you'd be fine without underwear.
sentences.text_zh: 格洛丽亚，咱们都知道，就算没穿内衣你也照样过得挺好。

sentences.text_en: I mean, we know it's not about that.
sentences.text_zh: 我的意思是，大家心里都明白，关键不在这儿。

sentences.text_en: No, it's about me not being accepted by my new family.
sentences.text_zh: 不，关键是我还没被新家庭接纳。

sentences.text_en: That is not true.
sentences.text_zh: 这不对。

sentences.text_en: Gloria, look, you're a beautiful woman.
sentences.text_zh: 格洛丽亚，听我说，你可是个漂亮的女士。

sentences.text_en: In fact, you're probably one of those beautiful women who doesn't even know it.
sentences.text_zh: 其实啊，你很可能就是那种连自己都意识不到美丽的女人。

sentences.text_en: No, I know it.
sentences.text_zh: 不，我清楚得很。

sentences.text_en: So, it's natural for Claire to wonder about you and her dad.
sentences.text_zh: 所以，克莱尔会对你和她爸爸的事感到好奇，这再正常不过了。

sentences.text_en: This family is very protective of each other.
sentences.text_zh: 这个家庭彼此都很护着对方。

sentences.text_en: I remember the first time Claire brought me home.
sentences.text_zh: 我记得第一次克莱尔把我带回家的时候。

sentences.text_en: Do you think Jay thought I was good enough for his little girl?
sentences.text_zh: 你觉得杰会认为我配得上他的小女儿吗？

sentences.text_en: No way.
sentences.text_zh: 才不会呢。

sentences.text_en: But over time, he realized that I loved Claire as much as he did.
sentences.text_zh: 不过时间一长，他慢慢发现，我对克莱尔的爱跟他对她的爱一样深。

sentences.text_en: And by then, Mitch had brought Cam home, so I was golden.
sentences.text_zh: 到那时候，米奇也把卡姆带回家了，所以我算是彻底稳住了。

sentences.text_en: Claire just needs a little time.
sentences.text_zh: 克莱尔只是需要点时间而已。

sentences.text_en: Then trust me, she'll be the most loyal friend you've ever had.
sentences.text_zh: 到时候你放心吧，她会是你这辈子最忠诚的朋友。

sentences.text_en: No, no, don't tell me, tell her.
sentences.text_zh: 不不，别告诉我，去告诉她吧。

sentences.text_en: Gloria, right now I'm really angry at Phil.
sentences.text_zh: 格洛丽亚，我现在真的对菲尔很生气。

sentences.text_en: Oh, let's respect the process.
sentences.text_zh: 哦，让我们尊重这个过程吧。

sentences.text_en: Gloria, I don't know why you think I don't like you.
sentences.text_zh: 格洛丽亚，我不明白你为什么觉得我不喜欢你。

sentences.text_en: Well, sometimes when you see me, you make that face.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，有时候你见到我的时候，就会做出那种表情。

sentences.text_en: What face?
sentences.text_zh: 什么表情？

sentences.text_en: Like this?
sentences.text_zh: 像这样吗？

sentences.text_en: I do not make a face like that.
sentences.text_zh: 我才不会做那种表情呢。

sentences.text_en: Oh my God.
sentences.text_zh: 我的天哪。

sentences.text_en: That is so clear.
sentences.text_zh: 这太清楚了。

sentences.text_en: Mitchell.
sentences.text_zh: 米切尔。

sentences.text_en: See?
sentences.text_zh: 看到了吗？

sentences.text_en: She does that with everyone.
sentences.text_zh: 她对谁都这样。

sentences.text_en: It's just her face.
sentences.text_zh: 这只是她的表情而已。

sentences.text_en: No, it's not just the face.
sentences.text_zh: 不，不只是表情。

sentences.text_en: From the beginning, I feel like Manny and I are not welcome in this family.
sentences.text_zh: 从一开始，我就觉得曼尼和我不受这个家庭的欢迎。

sentences.text_en: That is so crazy.
sentences.text_zh: 这也太离谱了吧。

sentences.text_en: No, it's not so crazy.
sentences.text_zh: 不，没那么离谱。

sentences.text_en: It's how I feel.
sentences.text_zh: 这就是我的感觉。

sentences.text_en: I am sorry, if you feel that way.
sentences.text_zh: 如果你有这种感觉，我很抱歉。

sentences.text_en: I really am.
sentences.text_zh: 我真的很抱歉。

sentences.text_en: Because from the moment I met you, I have tried to make you feel comfortable with us.
sentences.text_zh: 因为自从我认识你开始，我就一直努力让你在我们家感到自在。

sentences.text_en: You think it's only in my head?
sentences.text_zh: 你觉得这只是我自己的想法吗？

sentences.text_en: No, kind, I don't know.
sentences.text_zh: 不，亲爱的，我不知道。

sentences.text_en: I mean, we really love having you and Manny and our family.
sentences.text_zh: 我的意思是，我们真的很高兴有你和曼尼加入我们的家庭。

sentences.text_en: Really?
sentences.text_zh: 真的吗？

sentences.text_en: So, you don't have to be so defensive.
sentences.text_zh: 所以，你不用这么防备啦。

sentences.text_en: I do that, don't I?
sentences.text_zh: 我确实会这样，不是吗？

sentences.text_en: I'm feeling a hug.
sentences.text_zh: 我好想来个拥抱啊。

sentences.text_en: I was thinking group hug, but this is nice.
sentences.text_zh: 我本来想着大家围成一圈抱一抱呢，不过这样也不错。

sentences.text_en: I'd be there if I could, oh my god, there's hugging.
sentences.text_zh: 要是能的话，我真想去抱一下，天哪，居然还有人抱呢。

sentences.text_en: Haley, get off the phone already.
sentences.text_zh: 海莉，快把电话放下吧。

sentences.text_en: Where did you go?
sentences.text_zh: 你去哪儿了？

sentences.text_en: You heard him?
sentences.text_zh: 你听见他说了吗？

sentences.text_en: You said get out of here.
sentences.text_zh: 你说要离开这里。

sentences.text_en: Oh my god, you're such a girl.
sentences.text_zh: 天哪，你真是个女孩子啊。

sentences.text_en: Dad, look, I was coming to get a beer anyways.
sentences.text_zh: 爸爸，你看，我本来就是来拿啤酒的。

sentences.text_en: Nice apology.
sentences.text_zh: 不错的道歉。

sentences.text_en: Nice beer.
sentences.text_zh: 不错的啤酒。

sentences.text_en: Hey, there's our little roust about.
sentences.text_zh: 嘿，这就是我们那点小打小闹啊。

sentences.text_en: You look like you patched things up pretty good, huh?
sentences.text_zh: 看起来你们把事情挺好的解决了，是吧？

sentences.text_en: Yeah.
sentences.text_zh: 是啊。

sentences.text_en: We can learn so much from the children.
sentences.text_zh: 我们能从孩子们身上学到好多东西。

sentences.text_en: , but it seems kind of silly now,
sentences.text_zh: ,不过现在看来有点傻乎乎的了,

sentences.text_en: which we've been fighting for lunch for lunch every day,
sentences.text_zh: 我们每天为了午饭都吵个不停,

sentences.text_en: I made fun of him because his mom used to dig coal.
sentences.text_zh: 我以前还取笑他呢，因为他妈妈以前挖过煤。

sentences.text_en: What?
sentences.text_zh: 什么？

sentences.text_en: He said you were a cold digger.
sentences.text_zh: 他说你是‘冷冰冰的挖煤人’。

sentences.text_en: Okay, I think we can move on.
sentences.text_zh: 好吧，我觉得我们可以继续了。

sentences.text_en: Who said I was a cold digger?
sentences.text_zh: 谁说我是个‘冷冰冰的挖煤人’？

sentences.text_en: That's what my mom told me.
sentences.text_zh: 是我妈这么跟我说的。

sentences.text_en: What's a cold digger?
sentences.text_zh: 什么叫‘冷冰冰的挖煤人’？

sentences.text_en: What's a cold digger?
sentences.text_zh: 什么叫‘冷冰冰的挖煤人’？

sentences.text_en: Sweetheart, you heard it wrong.
sentences.text_zh: 亲爱的，你听错啦。

sentences.text_en: It's gold digger.
sentences.text_zh: 是‘淘金者’。

sentences.text_en: I'm going to have to call you back.
sentences.text_zh: 我得再给你回个电话。

sentences.text_en: Well, I really do not think that I remember ever saying that.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，我真的不觉得我记得自己说过那句话。

sentences.text_en: Well, you sent in the car.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，是你把车送来的。

sentences.text_en: You said at Christmas.
sentences.text_zh: 你在圣诞节时说过。

sentences.text_en: You sent Mexican rock out.
sentences.text_zh: 你把墨西哥摇滚送出去了。

sentences.text_en: Hey, Mr. leaves the sweatshirts at school every day
sentences.text_zh: 嘿，先生每天都把卫衣落在学校里

sentences.text_en: and suddenly remembers everything.
sentences.text_zh: 然后突然就什么都记起来了。

sentences.text_en: Thank you.
sentences.text_zh: 谢谢。

sentences.text_en: And it was all in my head, huh?
sentences.text_zh: 原来这一切都只是我的幻觉，是吧？

sentences.text_en: Oh, listen, Gloria, it was like a year ago before I knew you...
sentences.text_zh: 哦，听着，格洛丽亚，大概是一年前我才认识你……

sentences.text_en: Nice going. Not my mom and my sister are fighting.
sentences.text_zh: 干得不错。不是我妈妈和我妹妹在吵架。

sentences.text_en: If I say something that everybody else is thinking,
sentences.text_zh: 如果我说了一些大家都这么想的话，

sentences.text_en: does that make me a mean person?
sentences.text_zh: 那算不算我是个刻薄的人呢？

sentences.text_en: Or does it make me a brave person, one who was courageous enough to stand up and say something
sentences.text_zh: 还是说我是个勇敢的人，一个敢于站出来、说出心里话的人，

sentences.text_en: behind someone's back to 10-year-old?
sentences.text_zh: 甚至敢在别人背后对一个十岁的小孩这么说？

sentences.text_en: Well, she's pissed.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，她生气了。

sentences.text_en: Yeah, she wouldn't even come out of her room.
sentences.text_zh: 是啊，她连房间都不肯出来了。

sentences.text_en: Did you really have to call her that?
sentences.text_zh: 你真的非得那样叫她吗？

sentences.text_en: A gold digger.
sentences.text_zh: ‘拜金女’。

sentences.text_en: Well, you know what, dad?
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，你知道吗，爸爸？

sentences.text_en: It was a year ago.
sentences.text_zh: 那是一年前的事了。

sentences.text_en: And it was a natural question to ask.
sentences.text_zh: 而且那本来就是个很自然的问题。

sentences.text_en: She's a beautiful, hot woman,
sentences.text_zh: 她是个又美又火辣的女人，

sentences.text_en: and you're not exactly, you know.
sentences.text_zh: 而你嘛，说实话，并不算……

sentences.text_en: Not exactly what?
sentences.text_zh: 不算什么？

sentences.text_en: Um, Mitchell, little help.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，米切尔，帮个忙呗。

sentences.text_en: No, you are doing great.
sentences.text_zh: 不，你做得很好。

sentences.text_en: Now see, this is exactly why we sweep things under the rug,
sentences.text_zh: 你看，这正是我们总爱把事情压下去的原因，

sentences.text_en: so people don't get hurt.
sentences.text_zh: 免得伤了别人。

sentences.text_en: Well, yeah, until you sweep too much under the rug.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，是啊，可要是压得太狠，

sentences.text_en: Then you got a lumpy rug.
sentences.text_zh: 那地毯就变得疙疙瘩瘩的了。

sentences.text_en: Creates a tripping hazard.
sentences.text_zh: 不但容易绊倒人，

sentences.text_en: Open yourself up to lawsuits.
sentences.text_zh: 还可能惹上官司呢。

sentences.text_en: Boy, you can go a really long time without blinking.
sentences.text_zh: 哎呀，你真能好久都不眨眼睛啊。

sentences.text_en: Gloria, it's Phil.
sentences.text_zh: 格洛丽亚，我是菲尔。

sentences.text_en: Hi, can I talk to you for a second?
sentences.text_zh: 嗨，能和你聊一会儿吗？

sentences.text_en: Claire likes to say you can be part of the problem or part of the solution.
sentences.text_zh: 克莱尔常说，你可以是问题的一部分，也可以是解决方案的一部分。

sentences.text_en: Well, I happen to believe that you can be both.
sentences.text_zh: 而我呢，恰恰相信你既能是问题的一部分，也能是解决方案的一部分。

sentences.text_en: Listen, Claire feels terrible.
sentences.text_zh: 听着，克莱尔现在特别难受。

sentences.text_en: Why don't you talk to her?
sentences.text_zh: 要不你跟她聊聊吧？

sentences.text_en: Why, I know what she thinks.
sentences.text_zh: 干嘛呢，我知道她在想啥。

sentences.text_en: A cold, dear.
sentences.text_zh: 冷冰冰的，亲爱的。

sentences.text_en: You know, she's saying gold.
sentences.text_zh: 你知道吗，她说的是‘金子’。

sentences.text_en: Yes, Phil.
sentences.text_zh: 对，菲尔。

sentences.text_en: Well, I know she said that, but that was a long time ago.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，我知道她以前这么说过，不过那是很久以前的事了。

sentences.text_en: Before...
sentences.text_zh: 在……之前……

sentences.text_en: Do you buy me nice things?
sentences.text_zh: 你会给我买好东西吗？

sentences.text_en: Yes, of course, all beautiful things.
sentences.text_zh: 当然啦，全是漂亮的东西。

sentences.text_en: Look at this, yellow, red, blue, all the colors.
sentences.text_zh: 瞧瞧这个，黄的、红的、蓝的，各种颜色都有。

sentences.text_en: Do you think I can't live without this?
sentences.text_zh: 你觉得没有这些我就活不下去吗？

sentences.text_en: Take them away, Phil.
sentences.text_zh: 拿走它们吧，菲尔。

sentences.text_en: Gloria, we all know you'd be fine without underwear.
sentences.text_zh: 格洛丽亚，咱们都知道，就算没穿内衣你也照样过得挺好。

sentences.text_en: I mean, we know it's not about that.
sentences.text_zh: 我的意思是，大家心里都明白，关键不在这儿。

sentences.text_en: No, it's about me not being accepted by my new family.
sentences.text_zh: 不，关键是我还没被新家庭接纳。

sentences.text_en: That is not true.
sentences.text_zh: 这不对。

sentences.text_en: Gloria, look, you're a beautiful woman.
sentences.text_zh: 格洛丽亚，听我说，你可是个漂亮的女士。

sentences.text_en: In fact, you're probably one of those beautiful women who doesn't even know it.
sentences.text_zh: 其实啊，你很可能就是那种连自己都意识不到美丽的女人。

sentences.text_en: No, I know it.
sentences.text_zh: 不，我清楚得很。

sentences.text_en: So, it's natural for Claire to wonder about you and her dad.
sentences.text_zh: 所以，克莱尔会对你和她爸爸的事感到好奇，这再正常不过了。

sentences.text_en: This family is very protective of each other.
sentences.text_zh: 这个家庭彼此都很护着对方。

sentences.text_en: I remember the first time Claire brought me home.
sentences.text_zh: 我记得第一次克莱尔把我带回家的时候。

sentences.text_en: Do you think Jay thought I was good enough for his little girl?
sentences.text_zh: 你觉得杰会认为我配得上他的小女儿吗？

sentences.text_en: No way.
sentences.text_zh: 才不会呢。

sentences.text_en: But over time, he realized that I loved Claire as much as he did.
sentences.text_zh: 不过时间一长，他慢慢发现，我对克莱尔的爱跟他对她的爱一样深。

sentences.text_en: And by then, Mitch had brought Cam home, so I was golden.
sentences.text_zh: 到那时候，米奇也把卡姆带回家了，所以我算是彻底稳住了。

sentences.text_en: Claire just needs a little time.
sentences.text_zh: 克莱尔只是需要点时间而已。

sentences.text_en: Then trust me, she'll be the most loyal friend you've ever had.
sentences.text_zh: 到时候你放心吧，她会是你这辈子最忠诚的朋友。
